pause_reason: human-verify checkpoint in plan 03 — requires manual PDF verification of first-ever calendar section render

completed_tasks.name: Scheduler fan-out + per-user try/catch + getAllUsersFn DI + SCH-09 test
Prioritize cache-key scoped by userId + CACHE-01/02 tests
Thread userId into calendar-service; delete getSeedUserId; rewrite TODO in place
Thread userId through brief-assembly CalendarServiceDeps + assembleAndRender
Atomically wire calendarService into both brief-assembly call sites + route userId plumbing + gmail TODO update

remaining_tasks.name: Human-verify brief PDF renders calendar section (or degrades gracefully when no Google OAuth)

remaining_phase_work.detail: After human-verify passes: continuation agent writes 109-03-SUMMARY.md, updates STATE.md (state advance-plan/update-progress/record-metric/record-session), updates ROADMAP.md (roadmap update-plan-progress 109), makes final metadata commit. SCHED-01 mark-complete is idempotent (Plan 01 already marked it).
Spawn gsd-verifier to write VERIFICATION.md; checks must_haves against codebase and SCHED-01 in REQUIREMENTS.md

blockers.description: Plan 03 Task 4 requires human to start vigil-core, POST to /v1/brief/generate, and confirm calendar section renders in the resulting PDF (Path A) OR that the brief still generates without a stack trace when no Google OAuth is connected (Path B).
blockers.workaround: None — explicit design choice (D-12). This is the first time the calendar section goes live in production; grep + build + tests cannot substitute for eyeballing the rendered PDF.

human_actions_pending.context: Plan 109-03 Task 4. Choose Path A (Google OAuth connected) or Path B (no OAuth, prove graceful degradation). Full instructions in the .continue-here.md under 'Path A / Path B'.

decisions.decision: SCHED-01 is marked complete in REQUIREMENTS.md by Plan 01's executor even though plans 02 and 03 also contribute to its SCs
decisions.rationale: Requirement frontmatter listed SCHED-01 on Plan 01; mark-complete is idempotent for plans 02 and 03. Phase verifier will reconcile at phase close.

decisions.decision: Plan 03 Task 3 wires `calendarService: createCalendarService()` into BOTH index.ts:206-213 and routes/brief-generate.ts:40-47 atomically in a single commit
decisions.rationale: D-12 — both call sites must change together; previously neither passed calendarService, so briefs have never actually contained calendar events from either path.

decisions.decision: gmail-workorder-service.ts TODO rewritten in place to note deferral (AUTH-06+)
decisions.rationale: D-15/D-16 hygiene pattern from Phase 108 — don't strand stale TODOs after the seed-user scaffolding comes out.

next_action: User: run Path A or Path B from .continue-here.md and respond 'approved' or describe anomaly. Then continuation agent closes Plan 03 and runs phase-level gates.
context_notes: Phase 109 execution in progress. Plans 01 + 02 fully complete and committed. Plan 03 has 3/4 task commits landed (5 git commits total for plan 03). Build passes (npm run build exit 0) and 276/276 tests pass per-file across touched + adjacent test files. Known pre-existing issue flagged by plan 02 executor: `npm test` in vigil-core hangs because src/integration/cross-user-isolation.test.ts imports ../index.js which triggers setInterval on module load — use per-file `npx tsx --test <file>` until a test-mode guard lands in index.ts. Not a regression; unrelated to phase 109.
